preFixReproduction.observed: The active Short and bottom dock moved upward and a large dark lower half became visible.

rootCause: The master review used centred scrollIntoView on a dock action inside an overflow-hidden app. Translated off-screen Shorts made the app programmatically scrollable, so reveal scrolling changed product-internal state.
resolution: When a target is already fully contained, capture its overflow-hidden and clipped ancestor scroll positions before revealing it and restore them immediately after each reveal. Document scrolling and genuinely off-screen targets remain unrestricted.
